calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-17-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Vantree, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.

Tony Ruch Esq. for and with the Plaintiff: SFHA, with witness Kendra Crawford was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by Defendant Rhonda Tolbert

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for Judgment as follows:

Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 106 Sixth St. #405, San Francisco, CA 94103.
The lease is forfeited.
Past-due rent - $864.00
Holdover Damages - $369.60
Costs - $ 0.00
Total - $ 1,233.60

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-17-2012 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-11-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: D. Hakewill/M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Willie Daniels.
Attorney Tony Ruch appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Rhonda Tolbert is not present.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant. The trial date of JAN-17-2012 remains on calendar.
